title: Robert Mueller, Former FBI Director, Dies at 81
summary: Robert Mueller, who led the Trump-Russia investigation, has died at 81.
charlotte_impact: Mueller's investigation had a profound impact on US politics and his death marks the end of an era.

title: Trump Threatens ICE Deployment to Airports Amid Shutdown
summary: Trump threatens to deploy ICE to airports during a Homeland Security shutdown.

title: Iran Retaliates Against Israel with Nuclear Facility Strike
